programme.title: Queen Of The Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attaché for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: Las Vegas Day 1, Part 7 & 8, Final Table 1 & 2
programme.desc: Young Fedor Holz commands the chip lead, and he competes against top professionals.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Las Vegas Final Table & Conclusion - $1.6 million Top Prize.
programme.desc: Young Fedor Holz holds a massive chip lead, and competes against Daniel Negreanu and Nick Petrangelo for the top prize of nearly $1.6 million.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bellagio Cup V - Part 1
programme.desc: In what could be the toughest WPT final table ever, eight-time WSOP bracelet winner and WPT Champion Erik Seidel takes on five hungry young pros in the kickoff event of Season Eight on the World Poker Tour.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychopathic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: Vampyr
programme.desc: A drifter obsessed with the supernatural stumbles upon an inn where a severely ill adolescent girl is slowly becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Zelig
programme.desc: Leonard Zelig's neurotic insecurity forces him to mimic whomever he's with. Treated by Dr. Eudora Fletcher, Zelig is cured. But when misdeeds from his past resurface, Zelig is on the run, and Eudora must search the world over to find and save him.

programme.title: Hitler The Last Ten Days
programme.desc: Alec Guinness plays Adolf Hitler in this chilling dramatization of the last days of the Third Reich. Trapped in the Berlin bunker with his mistress and high command, Hitler comes apart...

programme.title: Company K
programme.desc: World War I troubled veteran Joe Delaney attempts to compile a history of his U.S. Marines company but nightmares about the German soldier he killed haunt him still.

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: Despite The Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Nell MacDermott loses her husband in a fiery boating accident and visits a psychic to connect with him again. But when she's informed that he was murdered, Nell is compelled to find the killer searching for an elusive witness who could solve the mystery.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Space hero Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-canine buddy Barf (John Candy) are on a mission in their flying Winnebago to save Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) from the clutches of Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) in Mel Brooks' inspired sci-fi spoof!

programme.title: SpaceWalker
programme.desc: In the heat of the Cold War, the USA and the USSR fight for supremacy in space, with both superpowers competing to be the first to have a man walk in outer space. Prepare to step into the unknown.

programme.title: Fighting The Sky
programme.desc: Researchers track down the origin of other-worldly sounds.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Peter in a Pickle
programme.desc: Peter goes to Scotland and discovers that his boss Bryan Sr. has followed, Beat and André face a client with buyer’s remorse, while Joel agrees to build an elaborate doghouse and birdhouse, all for a slice of cake.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge experiences a white-knuckle ride, climbing a mountain with an angry load.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge experiences a white-knuckle ride, climbing a mountain with an angry load.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame hits the mud, and Sludge's mountain mission takes a downhill slide.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Husband and wife team Nick and Jo face tough driving conditions with volatile cargo.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Russel tackles a graveyard of wrecked cars.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Error At Daybreak
programme.desc: A shady businessman collapses on an oceanside jetty, the apparent victim of a heart attack, but March discovers blood and a needle near the body.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Hot Money
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, the suspect, never out of sight, goes to his office where he locks himself in. But when the police search, there is no money!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Missing Link
programme.desc: A skull, known as the Damascus man, is stolen from a museum and Colonel March's life is imperiled trying to solve the case.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift
programme.desc: A barmaid receives a gift, a music box from a thief, dead ten years. But someone is soon murdered and Colonel March believes the music holds the key.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room
programme.desc: Murder and blackmail culminate when a call for help during a Javenese dance is the clue that Colonel March needs to prove a faulty alibi.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The New Invisible Man
programme.desc: Colonel March receives a queer complaint: a pair of disembodied gloves killed a manand there is no corpse, no blood, and no evidence of wrongdoing,

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Examine the influence that popular culture and entertainment have on daily life. As we gravitate to larger-than-life stories, outlandish myths begin to spread.

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Examine how conflict has reshaped nations and devastated generations. Wars dominate history but the reasons for them starting are constantly disputed.

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Explore the stories of the leaders and key figures who have defined periods of history and whose mythologies often outlive their influence.

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Explore and tackle the great unsolved mysteries of our world. Generations from now, their obscured truths will provide fertile ground for myth-making.

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Explore the groundbreaking discoveries, inventions and inventors throughout history that have changed the way we live our lives.

programme.title: A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical
programme.desc: In A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical, the creators of Back to the Future fight to bring their beloved franchise to the stage.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Sydney at Ten
programme.desc: Sydney's roommate from school is on track of a pendant from her past and enlists Sydney to help find it and catch the killer.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 AD: A sheik uses the Light of Truth to reveal his general as a traitor. 2001: Prince Shareem drops out from Sydney's class to go search for the Light of Truth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney's on the hunt for a Pirate's booty, but will a traitor force her to walk the plank?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Near India, the pilgrims are stopped by the King of Geological Ages. Tripitaka is shackled with the Iron Collar of Death. Pigsy recognizes the queen—can they save their master in time?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey, Pigsy, and Sandy grow tired of their journey and part ways. Monkey returns to the Kingdom of Fruit and Flowers, reflecting on the mission and his restless spirit.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The evil Dogs of Plague, followers of the Great Hound of Hell, set out to destroy Monkey, Pigsy, Sandy, and Tripitaka in a battle of wit and strength.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shotenki and his demon master Kokufki lure men from nearby villages to their casino in Ittakudo, where gambling consumes their lives and fortunes.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Fraction Demon quizzes children about fractions and kidnaps those who answer correctly, forcing Pigsy to confront his ignorance and save them.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: To protect a convict-rehabilitation program, Ironside must exonerate a reformed burglar charged with jewel theft.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: After his wife is murdered, a convicted thief (William Shatner) is paroled in Ironside's custody to care for his son.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside assigns Whitfield to watch a crown prince (Bradford Dillman) threatened by enemies.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A socialite (Marsha Hunt) pressures the commissioner to solve a series of high-society dog snatchings.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown opposes parole for the psychotic murderer (Bill Bixby) who also caused the accidental death of his fiancée.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Beyond The Golden Door
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding a missing child, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover as workers in the garment industry and end up helping an undocumented worker from Guatemala find her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Suffer The Children
programme.desc: Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) become involved in an investigation of child abuse and possible murder when they rescue a four-year-old child from a window ledge. Also starring Al Waxman, Carl Lumbly, and John Karlen.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Better Than Equal
programme.desc: Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) must ignore their feminist sentiments when they are assigned to protect the life of ERA critic, Helen Granger (guest star Julie Adams), who is being harassed by a caller who is threatening her life.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Street Scene
programme.desc: After an elderly man (guest star George Petrie) is involved with the death of a gang member, Cagney and Lacey are accused of racial prejudice as they investigate what happened. The truth is finally revealed with the help of the victim's brother.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Witness To An Incident
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) both have differing recollections when it comes to the events surrounding a young officer fatally shooting a civilian. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip
programme.desc: On August 20, 2001, Charles Tremblay, 15, was beaten, then thrown into the St-Charles River where he drowned. Tremblay's body was discovered in the mud less than 24 hours after his death.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dire Straits
programme.desc: A college student in Staten Island meets a deceivingly charming man who sweeps her off her feet. But the relationship turns sour when his true nature is revealed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil
programme.desc: When Ron Ruse breaks up with his controlling girlfriend, Linda, she vows to get him back at any cost. Soon, demands turn to death threats and Ron goes on the run.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.desc: Carl makes a jaw-dropping discovery in the early hours.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 4
programme.desc: Paul Jackson has his work cut out stopping a runaway driver.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Stealth
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where the kings and queens of stealth lurk.

programme.title: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland
programme.desc: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland is a wildlife documentary about a white-tailed eagle family, a young otter and a giant catfish that share the wetlands of this country in Europe.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Pregnant Flint fights to keep her home and tensions at Whiskers cause loyal Brea to make an uncharacteristic move.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mitch becomes the Whiskers dominant male.

programme.title: Freaks Of The Sea
programme.desc: Creatures weirder than our wildest dreams lurk in the oceans of our planet.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prodigal Son
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Ties
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Special Delivery
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surface Scratches
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Great Debate
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Facebooked
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But unfortunately they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mano-a-Mano
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Road Show: Where Mercy is Shown
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room. The massage chair becomes a detriment to the workflow, so Willie takes Si around for a replacement prize.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Sadie, has a homecoming dance coming up, but Willie doesn't approve of her dress selection. Willie decides to take Sadie out to find her a new "appropriate" dress.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ring Around the Redneck
programme.desc: Though Jase lost his wedding ring long ago, Missy decides it's time for Jase to replace it with a new one. When Jase is duck hunting, once again, he loses the ring.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bass Man Standing
programme.desc: The Duck Commander team is invited to unveil a wing of the local Bass Pro shop that will feature their products.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dyeing his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Whose Trash Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Mark's friend is running for public office, and he's a very honest man. But things get out of hand when an opponent tries to win by going after his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hello and Farewell - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Silent Bell
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Reunion
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Source
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover how international governments investigate UFO sightings and the secrecy in which they shroud their findings.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 14
programme.desc: Alien Gods of Egypt. Experts scrutinise the engineering behind the Egyptians' Sphinx and pyramids. Could this advanced civilisation have received extra-terrestrial help?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode investigates the claim that there is an alien presence already on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Earth Portals: Experts unravel the secrets of the universe's earth portals: shortcuts through space that allow travellers to span vast distances in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Join us as we investigate the existence of UFOs and determine the possibility that they may be from Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Solar System UFOs: Discover the shocking truth about alien civilisations in our solar system. Check out derelict spacecrafts and explore the mysterious origins of UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Signs of Abduction: From loss of time and bizarre hazy memories, to terrifying accounts of alien surgery, these are the hidden signs of alien abduction.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nazi UFOs: Could alien technology have helped the Nazis' rise to power? Experts question whether Hitler had extraterrestrial help in his quest for world domination.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Between 1981 and 2011, cameras on NASA space shuttles have picked up many images of UFOs that experts still struggle to explain.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover theories relating to why aliens are interested in visiting Earth, including the allures of the human mind and human civilisation.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the US government's classified and declassified investigations into UFO sightings.

programme.title: Dynasty: La Mirage
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Acapulco
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Locket
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Search
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Idonesia, but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty: Samantha
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior.Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Lean on me
programme.desc: Leah and Corey take Ali to the geneticist and get some troubling news. Jenelle and Kieffer face court; Chelsea learns a friend is pregnant, and Jo is not around for Issac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Kieffer gets upset that Jenelle hung out with an old boyfriend while he was in jail and Leah gets the results of Ali's genetic testing. Also Kailyn gets into a car accident.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Making moves
programme.desc: Jenelle and Barb start fighting again so she decides to move in with her friend Tori. Meanwhile, Jo confronts Kailyn about filing for child support. Corey and Leah get some alarming news.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: The beginning of the end
programme.desc: Jenelle's downward spiral continues as she gets into a fight with Kieffer and her roommate Tori. Adam breaks up with Chelsea and she struggles to deal with it on her first day of work.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Love comes and goes
programme.desc: Kailyn's child support hearing is postponed. Jo finally meets her boyfriend Jordan for the first time. Jenelle has her day in court for the breaking and entering, and possession charges.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As her final step in getting her life together, Chelsea finds a GED class at a local college and takes her first practice test. Jenelle decides that rehab is the only way she'll stay clean.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Numbers War
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester battle for prime fishing spots in their quest to catch the elusive and lucrative Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: A Glenbrook farmer has been left seriously injured after one of his Highland cows has taken to him with its horns.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper team are about to take off to rescue a seriously injured man.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper team is responding to a life threatening emergency.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggles to save two young men who are feared drowned at Hahei; a Coromandel motorcyclist is struggling with punctured lungs, and young man is trapped inside a car after a high speed accident.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: A teenage motorcyclist is fighting for his life after crashing on a remote farm near Warkworth, a man has 2nd degree burns to his face and hands from an accidental explosion, and four men are missing after two boats capsized on the Kawhia bar.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare and much-loved 1964 Ford Capri Consul coupe comes up for auction. Paul takes a 1957 Leyland Comet truck for a spin, and Dave admits that high on his wish-list is a Citroën 2CV.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Live
programme.desc: Highlights of a special event featuring an in-person auction. Derek and Dave aim to get the right price for a 1958 Jaguar XK 150, and there's a bidding war for a 1975 Yamaha Fizzy.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type, a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in Lincolnshire picking up a 1935 Riley Falcon - a good-looking saloon car, with a pre-select gearbox.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek brings a small army of military hardware to Thornton-le-Dale, including a Studebaker Weasel tracked vehicle and a WWII-era Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Ann and Steve are called to help a woman, and it becomes clear she is having a heart attack and needs surgery. Stuart and Craig treat a woman who may be having an allergic reaction.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Sam and Joel help a man who is struggling to cope having found out he's been exposed to HIV, while Nic and Carla visit a lady who has a painful infected foot following surgery.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Chris and Tom go to the home of a young woman who is having suicidal thoughts and demonstrate how well trained they are at dealing with mental illness, as well as physical injury.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Ash and Jamie rush to a lady with severe chest pains who is losing consciousness, while Chris and Joel help a man with low kidney functions who has been picked up by the police.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Stuart head to the home of a former soldier who has fallen down some stairs and has a potential spinal injury. Jo and Laura treat a teenage boy having a seizure at college.

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Cheated … Your 3 Kids Aren't His!
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki’s boyfriend Tavon is a cheater. What will they say when he is caught on our hidden camera? Then, are James’ kids with Nikkie actually his?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Where Did My Man Learn New Sex Moves?
programme.desc: Has pregnant Kazia's fiancé been cheating on her and selling his body? Then, has Deanna been cheating on Manny? Who fathered her child?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape
programme.desc: On this special edition of The Maury Show, Maury brings celebrity guests to the stage to share some of the most intense and shocking real-life footage ever caught on tape.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Take the Test ... Did You Cheat?
programme.desc: These women are at their wit's end because they suspect their lovers of infidelity. These men swear that they’re just crazy or jealous, but Maury’s got the lie detector results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Wild Results ... Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: What happened after the shocking results? Plus Javar and Amber are still furious that their mom wants to marry a man half her age. Will they stop their wedding right before our eyes?

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Toni’s fiancée is a tattoo artist and wants to know if he’s been making his mark in bed with other women. Is Sandy’s fiancé cheating with married women? Is Juanita's fiancé a cheater?

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Kevin is winching a tanker which is leaning perilously close to an ancient wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a burnt-out low loader and portacabin and a bus blocking a mini roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Steve tackles an emergency when a lorry deposits a hazardous load.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 46-tonne artic has veered into a verge on a busy road and is going nowhere without help.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Action in this episode includes a burning truck full of bricks on the A69.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The dangers of teenage sex & underage drinking continues. Plus, in 2011, Rehtaeh, 15, was raped by four classmates , & after intense bullying, the teen took her own life. Then, Alexis, who says she too was raped at 15. A powerful cautionary tale. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet three women ready to divorce controlling, chauvinistic husbands. At Dr. Phil's Man Camp, an intensive week-long stay in The Dr. Phil House, can these couples repair the damage from their toxic attitudes, explosive fights and abusive behaviors? Part 5

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with couple Jennifer & Billy. She claims the family is targeted by "hackers". Billy says it's her doing the hacking. Billy decides to walk out on the relationship, but enroute to airport, Dr. Phil producers get a desperate call. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with David and his family.They claim Danielle is a violent, angry "devil" who becomes possessed. But are David and the family to blame for Danielle's behavior? Is there something deeper going on with Danielle? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues the dramatic story of Wade and Michelle. What started out as the story of a husband who admitted to being a sex addict and a compulsive liar, has turned into a frightening story of alleged rape and murder. Part 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do couples give up too easily on marriage? More newlyweds, married only a few months, are pulling off their wedding bands and calling it quits. Dr. Phil's guests haven't even been married a year, and are already wondering if they made the right decision.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by former F1 driver Karun Chandhok as they pit a Honda Civic Type-R, a Seat Leon Cupra-R, a Renault Megane RS and a Audi S3 against one another to see who will be crowned king of the hot-hatches in an all-new Deathmatch

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jonny Smith and Vicki Butler-Henderson review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.r

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8

programme.desc: A hospital visit thaws tensions between Aaron and Talia. Holly goes shopping for bridesmaid dresses and Casey hatches a plan behind Marnie's back. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Mysterious Stone Monuments of Markawasi Peru
programme.desc: Travel high into the Peruvian Andes to explore the strange, wondrous and unexplained mysteries of stone formations that may have been carved by thousands of years of erosion -- or the hands of a long-dead civilization

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries related to ancient texts including the Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Torah, the Secrets of Fulcanelli, the Tao Te Ching, the Vedas.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS
programme.desc: Imaging a black hole was a breakthrough in astronomy, now with the new satellite IXPE high energy telescope we will be looking at some of the most dramatic, and most violent objects in the universe: Colliding Black holes and Neutron Stars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones explores the reign of Edward II.

programme.title: Arthur: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers

programme.title: The Bat
programme.desc: A crazed killer known as "The Bat" is on the loose in a mansion full of people.

programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.desc: Ironside suspects a government witness's killer belongs to an anti-war organization helping draft evaders; guest Martin Sheen.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A blizzard traps Ironside in a remote cabin with an addict friend (Joseph Campanella) who has run out of drugs.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A murder attempt on Mark's law professor (James Daly) coincides with the class's re-creation of a murder trial; guest Tyne Daly.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter man (Richard Basehart) seeks revenge on the hippie pals who bilked him; guest Tim Considine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Police reject a prominent financier's (Carl Betz) murder confession after his jealousy motive proves false.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Witness To An Incident
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) both have differing recollections when it comes to the events surrounding a young officer fatally shooting a civilian. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: One Of Our Own

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Beauty Burglars
programme.desc: Detectives Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are assigned to a special task force to investigate a series of beauty salon robberies. The case becomes more complicated when it is discovered that the burglars are posing as police officers.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: High Steel

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hotline
programme.desc: After three women are found strangled, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate whether or not there is a connection between the attacks and an erotic hotline. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Idol Worship
programme.desc: Jessica Sierra is excited to be an American Idol contestant. But when an obsessed fan starts calling non-stop, the thrill of fame turns to sheer terror when she receives disturbing threats.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Prisoner of Love

programme.desc: When kickboxing champion Lee Redmond helps a woman in need, he finds himself the object of what could soon become a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Maria Sanutti-Spencer revelled in her dad Rocco’s criminal past, and threatened violent retribution for anyone who crossed her. As her marriage broke down, her husband, Frank, saw first-hand what Maria and her father were capable of.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Claire and Andrew Tavener were a sociable couple. But when Andrew drank, he became paranoid and possessive. So when he threatened to kill his 'cheating' wife, his friends wrote it off as the rambling of a drunk.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Dallas Augustine had a rocky start in life, including a famous mother cut down in her prime by a murderous husband. Then, when she met Jessie McCaskill, it seemed her life had fallen into place. But their marriage soon descended into violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Jessica was swept off her feet by businessman Sonny. He totally adored her and her daughter, but adoration soon turned to jealousy and controlling behaviour. When she finally tried to leave him, it ended in two brutal murders.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Tom and Kelley Clayton were an alpha couple: attractive, athletic, popular. Drawn to the professional hockey player’s bad boy reputation, she would later discover just how bad her cheating, scheming husband really was.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Debbie Griggs had three young kids, and was pregnant with her fourth. But she believed husband Andrew was sleeping with a teenage girl, and had threatened divorce. That’s when she went missing, and it would take cops 20 years to uncover the truth.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
